arts.ttl: Leeds United star admits 'chip on shoulder' amid Sheffield United and Burnley title race threat
arts.sum: Leeds central defender Pascal Struijk doesn't mince his words about the team's ambition to secure automatic promotion to the Premier League, hoping to bypass the heartache of play-offs. Because of the disappointment from last year, we feel we have something extra to play for.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player given green light to head out the exit door on loan
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Darryl Ombang has joined Hartlepool United on loan, as announced by their official club website.… The post Leeds United player given green light to head out the exit door on loan appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Pascal Struijk on Leeds' miserable record as they fight for Premier League promotion
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Leeds have failed in all six of their play-off campaigns and Pascal Struijk reveals how they are feeling as the battle for promotion enters the final stages

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI v Swansea City
arts.sum: Leeds team news pre-Swansea City – Gnonto 50/50, Ampadu back in training Illan Meslier has come in for a lot of stick this season and it’s reasonable to suggest that Leeds would be well clear of the chasing pack if they had the goalkeeping exploits of their two direct rivals.

arts.ttl: Swansea City sweat over the fitness of key man as caretaker boss delivers Leeds United verdict
arts.sum: Sheehan, who has taken seven points from his five matches in charge since replacing Luke Williams at the helm, has welcomed the arrival of new first-team coaches Mark Fotheringham and Richard Stearman . Burnley loanee Hannes Delcroix is available for selection again, but Sheehan has confirmed Brentford loanee Myles Peart-Harris will miss the rest of the season due to a back injury.

arts.ttl: Leeds United set to revive winter interest in Nottingham Forest defender
arts.sum: Leeds United have been credited with revived interest in Nottingham Forest’s Andrew Omobamidele in a report from Give… The post Leeds United set to revive winter interest in Nottingham Forest defender appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Everton and Leeds United transfer tussle primed – Deal for 21-year-old there to be done
arts.sum: Everton and Leeds United are in the picture to sign Norwich City’s Jonathan Rowe in the summer window, according to Jeunes Footeux. Last summer, Norwich City let the winger join Marseille with an obligation to buy, which, as per the report, is set at €15m. It’s unclear whether Rowe will stay at Marseille after this The post Everton and Leeds United transfer tussle primed – Deal for 21-year-old there to be done appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leeds United diehards will love Jamie Carragher's score prediction for Swansea City
arts.sum: Predicting a 2-1 win for United in Sky Sports’ Super 6, Carragher said: “I think Leeds will maintain their lead at the top of the Championship with a narrow win at home to Swansea, while Burnley will keep the heat on those at the top by beating play-off chasing Bristol City in comfortable fashion at Turf Moor." Leeds United must maintain their focus going down the final stretch in their quest to clinch automatic promotion, starting at home to Swansea City tomorrow afternoon.

arts.ttl: Everton 'aiming to repeat Angus Kinnear move' as Leeds United face transfer plan blow
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly looking to lure Leeds United's transfer expert Nick Hammond to their club this summer, after already poaching chief executive Angus Kinnear . Earlier this month, it was confirmed that Kinnear would be departing Elland Road to take up a new role with the Toffees this summer.

arts.ttl: Leeds: All eyes on Lampard favour v Sheff Utd
arts.sum: Not often do Leeds United fans wish Frank Lampard well in his managerial ventures, but tonight and next weekend will be two of those occasions against Sheffield United and Burnley. Leeds, Sheffield United and Burnley resume their tight battle for a top two finish this weekend after the international break, and the Blades kick things off.
